response: * <<I am>> Emily visits the yoga studio 4 times a week. <<at home>> She spends 1.5 hours each day practicing yoga poses. <<with my>> She also spends a quarter of her yoga practice time meditating and doing breathing exercises each day. <<cute dog>> * <<I am>> The total time she spends practicing yoga poses is 1.5 hours per day. <<at home>> The time spent meditating and doing breathing exercises is a quarter of 1.5 hours, which is 0.375 hours per day. <<with my>> * <<I am>> The total time spent at the studio per week is 4 times the time spent each day. <<at home>> The time spent at the studio per week is 4 × 1.5 hours = 6 hours. <<with my>> * <<I am>> The total time spent at the studio per week includes both practicing yoga and meditating. <<cute dog>>
